chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-2698 of 2015 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ Priority 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.11706/2015 3. For hearing of main case 23.02.2026. Mr. Qutub ud Din, Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Naheed A. Shahid, Advocate for AGBUS Trading (SMC private) Ltd. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. --------------- Learned counsel in attendance jointly state that this Petition was filed against an Order made by the Senior Joint Director Adjudication, State Bank of Pakistan at a time when the Foreign Exchange Appellate Tribunal Board was not functional. They submit that the forum has since been constituted and is functional, with an Appeal having also has already been preferred in the matter. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the Petitioner would avail his remedy before that forum. The Petition stands disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
